requirement_topic.en: Grid-Connection and Project Acceptance for Solar PV Inverters in Albania
requirement_topic.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚光伏逆变器并网与项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞光伏逆變器併網與項目驗收

summary.en: Albania-facing PV inverters are reviewed in ERE / OST project packages at the connection point. The grid route, metering model, protection coordination, remote controls, reactive-power and voltage support settings, and commissioning conditions are project-specific and can differ from Chinese domestic acceptance practice.
summary.zh: 面向阿尔巴尼亚的光伏逆变器按接入点在 ERE / OST 项目文件中审查。并网路径、计量模型、保护配合、远程控制、无功与电压支撑设置、投运条件均为项目特定要求，可能与中国国内验收实践不同。
summary.zht: 面向阿爾巴尼亞的太陽能光伏逆變器按接入點在 ERE / OST 項目文件中審查。併網路徑、計量模型、保護配合、遠端控制、無功與電壓支撐設置、投運條件均為項目特定要求，可能與中國國內驗收實踐不同。

standards_or_laws: ERE technical and operational rules for generator and storage-grid interfaces used for project-specific interconnection
OST interconnection practice at connection points and supply substations
IEC 61000 and related grid-interface test methods for inverter behavior under site conditions

summary.en: China commonly applies GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 in domestic grid studies and acceptance for photovoltaic systems, plus utility-specific operational practices. These are useful for technical comparison but do not automatically satisfy Albanian project interconnection documentation.
summary.zh: 中国在国内通常采用GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964进行光伏系统并网研究和验收，并结合电网企业项目实践。这些可用于技术比较，但不能自动满足阿尔巴尼亚项目并网文档要求。
summary.zht: 中國在國內通常采用 GB/T 37408 和 GB/T 19964 進行光伏系統併網研究和驗收，並結合電網企業項目實踐。這些可用於技術比較，但不能自動滿足阿爾巴尼亞項目併網文件要求。

gap.en: For Albania-bound inverters, prepare project-level single-line diagrams, fault and trip settings, islanding and reconnection parameters, remote monitoring and dispatch compatibility, protection coordination, and commissioning records tied to the selected ERE / OST route.
gap.zh: 对于阿尔巴尼亚项目，需准备项目级单线图、故障和跳闸设置、防孤岛与重连参数、远程监控和调度兼容性、保护配合以及与所选 ERE / OST 路径一致的并网投运记录。
gap.zht: 對於阿爾巴尼亞項目，需準備項目級單線圖、故障和跳脫設定、防孤島與重連參數、遠端監控和調度兼容性、保護配合以及與所選 ERE / OST 路徑一致的併網投運記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where interconnection, dispatch participation, or market activity is requested by the project structure
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection templates are useful but do not replace Albania project interconnection gates

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grid acceptance is the key Albania gate for PV inverters. Build per-site evidence for protection, voltage/frequency, metering, and commissioning rather than relying on China acceptance reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于光伏逆变器，阿尔巴尼亚项目并网验收是关键。应按站点构建保护、电压频率、计量和投运证据，而非依赖中国国内验收报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於光伏逆變器，阿爾巴尼亞項目併網驗收是關鍵。應按站點構建保護、電壓頻率、計量和投運證據，而非依賴中國國內驗收報告。
